headline: Stop the gain, start the deficit today
summary: You need to shift 0.78 kg/week immediately; today is about executing perfect portions and earning 45 minutes of movement.
details: Eat three Huel meals today—no snacking, no exceptions—to lock in precise calorie control and break the weekend pattern before Friday arrives. Put in 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today to create caloric deficit and remind yourself what discipline feels like. Today is the reset day that determines whether you drift further behind or finally start catching up to your June 2027 goal.
